name: Set Reminder
description: Adds a Windows scheduled task reminder that shows a notification
author: AgentOS

steps.command: $triggerTime = (Get-Date).AddMinutes(10); $trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -Once -At $triggerTime; $action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute 'msg' -Argument '* Reminder: Your AgentOS reminder is due!'; Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'AgentOS_Reminder' -Trigger $trigger -Action $action -Force | Out-Null; Write-Output "Reminder set for $($triggerTime.ToString('HH:mm'))"
